highlights.text: Hanoi (3N) → Coastal Sanctuary (2N) premium ladies retreat
Chic Hanoi shopping gems & fashion boutique tour
Coastal spa rejuvenation & farewell gala under the stars

itinerary.title: Vietnam Ladies Escape
itinerary.tagline: Hanoi Shopping • Boutique Stays • Culinary Masterclasses • Coastal Relaxation
itinerary.overview: Rejuvenate, explore, and bond with TRAGUIN's curated Vietnam Ladies Escape. Designed for style and relaxation, this journey combines the chic boutiques of Hanoi, private culinary masterclasses, and ultimate coastal rejuvenation — ensuring unforgettable memories in the most elegant corners of Vietnam.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Vietnam ladies retreat (VN-005): Hanoi shopping, culinary masterclass, and coastal spa rejuvenation.

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi & Style Welcome
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private chauffeur transfer to a handpicked boutique hotel. Evening welcome dinner in a stylish, garden-setting restaurant.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private chauffeur transfer, stylish welcome dinner

days.title: Chic Shopping & Hanoi Charm
days.description: A guided tour of Hanoi's hidden shopping gems and chic fashion boutiques. Perfect for a day of style and discovery, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Guided shopping and boutique tour

days.title: Culinary Masterclass
days.description: Join an exclusive culinary masterclass, learning to prepare authentic Vietnamese dishes in a beautiful, private garden setting.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Vietnamese culinary masterclass
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Masterclass Lunch

days.title: Coastal Rejuvenation
days.description: Transfer to a pristine coastal sanctuary. Spend the day indulging in personalized spa therapies and relaxation by the private beach — a premium retreat.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Transfer to coastal sanctuary, personalized spa therapies
Overnight Stay: Coastal Sanctuary (Luxury Resort & Spa)

days.title: Coastal Leisure & Farewell Gala
days.description: Final day of coastal leisure and boutique shopping, followed by a grand farewell gala dinner under the stars, celebrating the perfect ladies' escape.
activities: Evening Experience: Grand farewell gala dinner under the stars
Overnight Stay: Coastal Sanctuary (Luxury Resort & Spa)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gala Dinner

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private chauffeur transfer to the airport, completing your premium Vietnam retreat.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private chauffeur airport transfer

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked boutique hotels across Hanoi and a coastal sanctuary
Guided Hanoi shopping and fashion boutique tour
Personalized spa therapies and coastal rejuvenation
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated ladies retreat concierge support
International airfare and Vietnam entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
